title: AST DUI: Fairbanks [AK25042102]
summary: On May 2, 2025, at approximately 2017 hours, the Alaska State Troopers initiated a traffic stop on the Richardson Highway. After an investigation, Cory Matson, age 37, was arrested for DUI. He was remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center without incident.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST MICS  5: Fairbanks [AK25042093]
summary: On May 2nd 2025, at about 1948 hours, Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle for moving violations in the area of Old Steese Hwy. Upon further investigation, Troopers seized a digital scale, baggies, and about 10 grams of suspected meth. Charged forwarded to the DAO.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: New Reconciliation Bill is a Billionaire Land Grab That Sacrifices Alaska and Silences the Public
summary: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Date: 05/02/2025 Contact : Anja Semanco | 724-967-2777 | anja@alaskawild.org Washington, D.C. – The release of House Natural Resource’s budget reconciliation bill text late last night reveals provisions that would dramatically expand oil and gas development in Alaska’s Arctic regions while limiting environmental review and restricting judicial oversight. “Alaska’s public lands and waters are directly in the crosshairs of a desperate attempt by Congress to pay for Trump’s billionaire tax cuts,” said Kristen Miller, Executive Direct...

title: SIWO Forecast – May 2, 2025
summary: Assessment of Current Ice Conditions Relevant to Distribution and Access of Walrus Click the name of each community below to view more frequently updated and detailed information from the National Weather Service. Synopsis : Weak northerly flow persists over the region with north winds and a few flurries. A front over the Interior will move west and bring scattered snow showers to the Norton Sound Region on Saturday and west to St. Lawrence Island on Sunday. Most of the area dries out by Monday and remains dry for much of next week until a few snow showers return on Wednesday and Thursday in the Bering Strait. There may be a Bering Sea low which tries to intrude at the end of the next week, but there is some uncertainty. Near St. Lawrence Island Shorefast ice extends 1 mile (1.5 km) offshore of Gambell and Savoonga, and up to 5 miles (7.5 km) offshore between the two. Between Ataakas...

title: Kendra Kloster
summary: Kendra (Kahtle-et) Kloster (Tlingit/German/Irish) is the Director of Government Relations. She was born in the beautiful community of Wrangell, Alaska, and spent most of her childhood in Juneau, and is currently raising her three children on Dena’ina lands in Anchorage. title: Toan Nguyen
summary: Toan Nguyen is the Staff Accountant. He is a dedicated father of two daughters and a proud graduate of the University of Alaska Anchorage, where he earned his bachelor’s degree in accounting. Having lived in Anchorage for over 25 years, with a passion for outdoors, he enjoys fishing, camping, and ex...

title: Geoff Toy
summary: Geoff is AFN’s Staff Attorney. Prior to joining AFN in 2024, Geoff was with Trustees for Alaska, working on federal litigation protecting Alaskan lands, wildlife, and resources. Prior to joining Trustees, Geoff spent three years as a staff attorney with the Turner Environmental Law Clinic at Emory U...

title: Nicole James
summary: Nicole James serves as the Executive Assistant and Board Secretary. During the week, she handles phone calls, support emails, and provides information about AFN. She also manages the office and has been the Arts & Crafts Coordinator for several years. Nicole was raised in Anchorage and is a sharehol...

title: Nikki Stoops
summary: Nicole “Nikki” Stoops is the Vice President of Engagement. She joined AFN in July 2022. title: Nicole Espe
summary: Nicole Espe is the Assistant to the President. She grew up in Seattle, WA, and was adopted through the Indian Child Welfare Act to parents Marchell (father, Fred Johnson, a fisherman from Cordova) and John Espe. She is Alutiiq, from Old Harbor, and a shareholder of Chugach. She obtained a Bachelor o...
